scripts.validate: pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm knip && pnpm build
scripts.db:sync: pnpm --filter @salvemundi/db pull && node packages/db/scripts/normalize-schema.mjs && pnpm --filter @salvemundi/db build && pnpm --filter @salvemundi/validations generate:zod && pnpm --filter @salvemundi/validations typegen
